articles.description: Harry Kane is chasing Robert Lewandowski's incredible Bundesliga goal tally, while Kylian Mbappé seeks Champions League history. Here's the latest in Europe's record goal and assist tallies.

article.headline: Mats Hummels double helps Dortmund beat Freiburg in thriller
article.description: Borussia Dortmund's Mats Hummels scored twice to guide last season's Bundesliga runners-up to a nervous 4-2 win at Freiburg on Saturday.
article.linkText: Hummels brace steers Dortmund to 4-2 away win

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (SC Freiburg vs. Borussia Dortmund - Game Highlights) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

article.story:
Borussia Dortmund's Mats Hummels scored twice, including an 87th minute goal, to guide last season's Bundesliga runners-up to a nervous 4-2 win at Freiburg on Saturday.

Dortmund, who take on Paris St Germain in the Champions League group stage next week, took an 11th minute lead through the 34-year-old Hummels but instead of putting more pressure on the hosts they were more interested in protecting their lead.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

They paid the price in first half stoppage time with Freiburg scoring twice to turn the game on its head.

Lucas Hoeler first headed past keeper Gregor Kobel to cut the deficit in the second minute of stoppage time and then Nicolas Hoefler nodded in for the lead with the last move of the first half.

The visitors bounced back after the break and levelled on the hour, with substitute Niclas Fuellkrug sending Donyell Malen through and the Dutchman slotting in for his third goal of the season.

With Freiburg down to 10 men following the dismissal of Hoefler with a red card, Dortmund poured forward.

Hummels slid in to put them back in front after a lucky bounce in the 87th and substitute Marco Reus drilled in their fourth in stoppage time for his first goal of the season.

Dortmund are on eight points. Champions Bayern Munich, whose winning start was snapped on Friday following a 2-2 draw against Bayer Leverkusen, level on 10 points with Leverkusen.

RB Leipzig moved into third place on nine with a 3-0 win over Augsburg.

videos.headline: Freiburg shocks Dortmund with 2 goals just before halftime
videos.description: Freiburg's Lucas Holer and Nicolas Hofler score in first-half stoppage time to give Freiburg the lead over Dortmund.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Freiburg shocks Dortmund with 2 goals just before halftime) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

videos.headline: Marco Reus tacks on an insurance goal for Dortmund
videos.description: Marco Reus puts Dortmund ahead 4-2 with ease.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Marco Reus tacks on an insurance goal for Dortmund) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  SC Freiburg 0, Borussia Dortmund 1. Mats Hummels (Borussia Dortmund) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Julian Brandt with a cross   following a corner.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Vincenzo Grifo replaces Michael Gregoritsch because of an injury.
Goal!  SC Freiburg 1, Borussia Dortmund 1. Lucas Höler (SC Freiburg) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Vincenzo Grifo with a cross.
Ramy Bensebaïni (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal!  SC Freiburg 2, Borussia Dortmund 1. Nicolas Höfler (SC Freiburg) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Vincenzo Grifo with a cross   following a set piece situation.
Second Half begins SC Freiburg 2, Borussia Dortmund 1.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Marius Wolf replaces Ramy Bensebaïni.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Niclas Füllkrug replaces Sébastien Haller.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Felix Nmecha replaces Karim Adeyemi.
Goal!  SC Freiburg 2, Borussia Dortmund 2. Donyell Malen (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Niclas Füllkrug.
Marius Wolf (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Marco Reus replaces Julian Brandt.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Junior Adamu replaces Lucas Höler because of an injury.
Emre Can (Borussia Dortmund) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nicolas Höfler (SC Freiburg) is shown the red card.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Youssoufa Moukoko replaces Emre Can.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Merlin Röhl replaces Ritsu Doan.
Substitution, SC Freiburg. Kenneth Schmidt replaces Lukas Kübler.
Philipp Lienhart (SC Freiburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  SC Freiburg 2, Borussia Dortmund 3. Mats Hummels (Borussia Dortmund) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner    following a set piece situation.
Maximilian Eggestein (SC Freiburg) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  SC Freiburg 2, Borussia Dortmund 4. Marco Reus (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Marius Wolf.
